plan_summary.primary_goal: Deploy 30 mobile ingest units to recover 200+ petabytes of at-risk legacy media within 10 years
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests whether the $250M / 10-year budget covers a 30-MIU fleet's CapEx plus 10-year OpEx, whether the Phase 1 $60M tranche sustains the 3-pilot operational window, and whether the AI pre-screen plus 15% override keeps human review load under the 20% threshold.

key_values.label: Total project budget over 10 years
key_values.comment: Absolute funding ceiling across the entire 10-year deployment. Denominator for every coverage and runway test.
key_values.source_text: Total project budget over 10 years: $250 million

key_values.label: Phase 1 budget commitment
key_values.comment: Tranche that must sustain 3 pilot MIUs through the 18-month uptime gate to unlock Phase 2 scaling capex.
key_values.source_text: Phase 1 budget commitment: $60 million — stage funding input

key_values.label: Annual operating cost per MIU
key_values.comment: Primary operational burn input; source range $2-3M/year, central used here. Scales with fleet size and years.
key_values.source_text: Annual operating cost per mobile ingest unit range: $2-3 million/year

key_values.label: Capital cost per Mobile Ingest Unit
key_values.comment: CapEx per MIU; source range $3-4M, central used. Drives total fleet build cost.
key_values.source_text: Per mobile ingest unit cost range: $3-4 million

key_values.label: Target fleet size (MIUs)
key_values.comment: Total MIUs to deploy by Year 10 (3 pilot + 27 scale). Drives CapEx and OpEx totals.
key_values.source_text: 30 Mobile Ingest Units (MIUs) total (3 Pilot, 27 Scale)

key_values.label: Total program duration
key_values.comment: 10-year horizon for full deployment and the 200 PB recovery target. Multiplier on OpEx.

key_values.label: Human review load cap
key_values.comment: Hard threshold; if realised load exceeds 20% Phase 1 success and the review bottleneck goal fail.
key_values.source_text: If content requiring human review exceeds 20%, then Phase 1 success and review bottleneck goal is failed

derived_questions.question: Does the $60M Phase 1 tranche cover 3 pilot MIUs' CapEx plus their operational window before the Phase 2 gate?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Phase 1 funding must clear pilot CapEx and operating costs through the 18-month gate; a shortfall halts the whole program.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Phase 1 pilot operational duration
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Multiplier on Phase 1 OpEx; needed to test whether the $60M tranche sustains 3 pilot MIUs through the gate.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor on the 18-month uptime review cycle the plan names (1.5 years), bounded 1.0 to 2.0.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: AI pre-screen false positive rate
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Realised flag rate that the 15% override is applied on top of; drives total review load against the 20% cap.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor on the plan's 10% baseline assumption; bound 0.08 to 0.15 per Issue 3 sensitivity.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Mandatory human override watermark on AI flags
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Multiplier on the AI flag rate to compute total review load tested against the 20% cap.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Plan explicitly mandates 15% on all AI flags; treat as fixed at 0.15 with narrow bounds.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Total fleet capital cost
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Establishes the CapEx draw on the $250M envelope before OpEx layering.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Total fleet 10-year operating cost (steady-state proxy)
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Upper-bound OpEx layer assuming full fleet runs for the full horizon; tests budget headroom.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Budget surplus after CapEx and lifetime OpEx
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Core viability gate: does $250M absorb CapEx and 10-year OpEx for the planned fleet?

recommended_first_calculations.label: Realised total human review load
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Combines AI flag rate and 15% override into the load actually presented to reviewers.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Margin under the 20% human review cap
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests the explicit Phase 1 review-load gate; positive = pass.

unmodelled_gates.label: Securing 150-300 vintage units via LOIs by Month 6
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Phase 1 cannot start construction without sufficient vintage hardware acquired through an auction market the model does not represent.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Phase 1 stalls; cannibalization parts pipeline collapses and the modular-replacement R&D loses its baseline component pool.

unmodelled_gates.label: Binding data escrow agreements with three global cloud providers
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Long-term data sovereignty and post-deployment value depend on legally binding multi-vendor escrow that the model treats as a fixed input.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Decentralized archival strategy collapses; project loses its 75%-on-independent-servers goal and faces forced single-vendor migration.

unmodelled_gates.label: Tier 3 contractual liability accepted by Phase 1 archive partners
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Pre-Treatment Module strategy and reduced MIU crew sizing depend on partner archives accepting penalty clauses for pre-treatment failures.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Pre-treatment risk reverts to MIU crew; OpEx savings disappear and hardware damage exposure rises.

unmodelled_gates.label: GDPR-aligned PII/Copyright Marker Taxonomy approved by all Phase 1 partners
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Zero legal incidents requires a regulator-acceptable classification taxonomy the AI screen and human reviewers operate against; not testable as a number.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Human review cannot certify compliance; the zero-legal-incidents goal is breached and operations may be suspended.
